en.title: Best Treadmills 2026
en.description: Expert-tested rankings of the best home treadmills for 2026, from AI-powered connected fitness machines to subscription-free workhorses built to last a decade.

zh-tw.title: 最佳跑步機 2026
zh-tw.description: 從 AI 互動訓練到免訂閱耐用機型，2026 年最值得買的家用跑步機完整評比。

en.description: The 2026 model upgrades to a 4.25 CHP motor and adds ActivePulse, which reads real-time heart rate and auto-adjusts speed and incline to lock you into the target training zone — all paired with iFIT's AI-adaptive coaching on a 16-inch HD touchscreen.

zh-tw.description: 2026 年升級款搭載 4.25 CHP 馬達，ActivePulse 功能即時讀取心率並自動調整速度和坡度，讓你精準維持目標訓練心率區間，搭配 iFIT AI 教練和 16 吋 HD 觸控螢幕。

en.description: The most durable subscription-free treadmill at this price, with a 3.5 CHP motor, 22x60-inch deck, CushionFlex Whisper Deck, and a lifetime motor warranty.

zh-tw.description: 不綁訂閱費的最強耐用選擇，3.5 CHP 馬力加上 CushionFlex 靜音減震跑道，終身馬達保固真的很有誠意。

en.description: The widest incline range of any home treadmill at -5% to 20%, a 400-pound weight limit, and a 22-inch JRNY screen that streams Netflix and Hulu directly.

zh-tw.description: 家用跑步機中傾斜範圍最廣，-5% 到 20%，400 磅承重上限，22 吋螢幕可直接串流 Netflix，追劇跑步真的很爽。

en.description: The best choice for runners who need community accountability, with live leaderboard classes, Peloton IQ form feedback, and Sonos-powered audio built in.

zh-tw.description: 需要社群陪跑動力的最佳選擇，即時排行榜、Peloton IQ 跑姿回饋、Sonos 音響全部內建，就是每月 $49.99 會費要想清楚。

en.description: The strongest value in the iFIT ecosystem at around $1,599, with a 3.6 CHP motor, 12% incline, and a 16-inch touchscreen that mirrors NordicTrack's training content.

zh-tw.description: iFIT 生態裡 CP 值最高的一台，3.6 CHP 馬力、12% 坡度、16 吋螢幕，訓練內容跟 NordicTrack 共用，等打折入手划算。

en.description: The best folding treadmill for small apartments, with a hands-free Auto-Fold system that flattens the machine to 10 inches thick for under-bed storage.

zh-tw.description: 小坪數公寓的最佳解方，一鍵自動收折到只剩 10 吋厚，可以推到床底收納，Runner's World 編輯精選。

en.description: A commercial gym-grade treadmill for the home, featuring the FlexDeck shock absorption system that reduces joint impact by 30% compared to outdoor running.

zh-tw.description: 商業健身房等級帶回家，FlexDeck 減震系統比在柏油路上跑步少 30% 的膝蓋衝擊，長跑族保護膝蓋首選。

en.description: The best treadmill under $1,000, with a 3.0 CHP motor, 60-inch deck, 15% incline, Apple GymKit integration for Apple Watch heart rate and workout sync, QuickDial controls, and a lifetime frame and motor warranty with zero subscription required.

zh-tw.description: 千美金以下最強選擇，3.0 CHP 馬達、60 吋跑道、15% 坡度，支援 Apple GymKit 讓 Apple Watch 直接同步心率和運動數據，終身框架和馬達保固，完全不需要訂閱費。

en.description: The most immersive connected home treadmill available, with a 22-inch pivoting touchscreen, 1,000+ interactive game-based and coaching programs, a 3.5 CHP commercial-grade motor, and the lowest step-up height in the category at 4 inches.

zh-tw.description: 目前市場上沈浸感最強的家用跑步機，22 吋可旋轉觸控螢幕加上超過 1,000 支遊戲化和教練互動課程，3.5 CHP 商用等級馬達，踏板離地高度只有 4 吋是同類產品最低，方便上下機。

references.title: Best Treadmills of 2026 — Expert-Tested and Reviewed
The Best Treadmills of 2026 — Lab Tested & Ranked
Best Home Treadmills for 2026 — CPT-Tested & Reviewed
NordicTrack Commercial 1750 Review 2026
Sole F80 Review 2026 — 1.5-Year Long-Term Test
Bowflex Treadmill 22 Review 2026
ProForm Pro 9000 Treadmill Review 2026
Echelon Stride-6 Review 2026

en.commentary:
The NordicTrack Commercial 1750 earns the top spot because it delivers the best combination of hardware and software in 2026. The 3.5 CHP motor handles sustained running at pace, the 22x60-inch deck gives taller runners the room they need, and iFIT's SmartAdjust technology now uses generative AI to create training environments and automatically scales workout intensity to your real-time heart rate. No other home treadmill at this price point integrates that level of adaptive coaching. The $39 monthly iFIT subscription is the honest tradeoff, and for runners who actually use structured training programs, it pays off.

Sole F80 earns second place on the strength of its no-subscription philosophy and build quality that is genuinely rare at $1,799. The CushionFlex Whisper Deck absorbs shock at long-run paces without the spongy feel that plagues cheaper machines, and the lifetime motor warranty signals that Sole builds this machine to outlast most connected alternatives. For runners who want a machine that works without a monthly fee attached, this is the clear answer.

The 2026 home treadmill market now divides cleanly into two camps: AI-connected platforms like NordicTrack and Peloton that monetize through subscriptions, and performance-first machines like Sole and Horizon that compete on hardware longevity. The Bowflex Treadmill 22 sits between those camps, offering the most extreme incline range on the market at -5% to 20%, a 400-pound weight limit, and JRNY streaming that does not require its own proprietary content library. For runners focused on hill training, that -5% decline is a genuine differentiator that NordicTrack's -3% cannot match.

The Horizon 7.0 AT at $999 is the most important budget treadmill available because it does not sacrifice the fundamentals. A 60-inch deck, lifetime frame and motor warranty, and QuickDial speed controls place it above every other machine in this price range. Serious runners do not need a subscription to improve.

highlights.title: NordicTrack 1750 ranks first because iFIT's AI has hit a genuine inflection point
highlights.body: In 2026, iFIT introduced SmartAdjust, which reads your real-time heart rate and automatically raises or lowers the treadmill's speed and incline to keep you in the target training zone. Pair that with the Realms You Can't Reach series, which uses generative AI to render immersive running environments filmed where cameras cannot go, and you have a training platform that has moved well past a simple video library. The 16-inch swiveling touchscreen, Netflix and Spotify streaming alongside iFIT, and lifetime motor warranty round out a machine that earns its $2,499 price. The $39 monthly iFIT Pro fee is a real ongoing cost. Runners who use the platform consistently will find the adaptive coaching worth it.

highlights.title: Sole F80 is the right call for runners who refuse to pay a monthly fee
highlights.body: The home treadmill market in 2026 pushes subscription content hard. Sole pushes back with a machine that performs at $1,799 without ever asking for a monthly fee. The 3.5 CHP motor matches NordicTrack's power rating, the 22x60-inch deck is identically sized, and the CushionFlex Whisper Deck absorbs impact across long-run efforts in a way that feels engineered rather than padded. The 10.1-inch Android touchscreen and wireless phone charging pad add useful daily convenience. The lifetime frame and motor warranty means Sole is betting this machine outlasts the competition. For marathon trainers logging 50-mile weeks at home, that durability argument wins.

highlights.title: Bowflex Treadmill 22 owns the incline training category with its -5% to 20% range
highlights.body: No other home treadmill in 2026 reaches 20% incline. The industry standard tops out at 12% or 15%, and NordicTrack's premium models reach 15%. The Bowflex Treadmill 22 pushes to 20% and adds a -5% decline, which is the range serious hill and trail runners need to simulate real race courses indoors. The 400-pound weight limit is the highest in this comparison. The 22-inch JRNY touchscreen streams Netflix, Hulu, and Amazon alongside JRNY's own coaching content, and at $20 per month for JRNY, the ongoing cost is meaningfully lower than iFIT or Peloton. For runners training for hilly ultras or marathons with significant elevation, this machine is the only home option that matches the demand.

highlights.title: Peloton Tread leads on community but the $49.99 monthly membership changes the math
highlights.body: The Peloton Tread is the right machine for runners who need live class accountability and a competitive leaderboard to stay consistent. Peloton IQ's movement tracking and form feedback deliver coaching data that no other platform matches in real time. Sonos audio is built in. The issue is the running deck: at 59x20 inches, it is meaningfully shorter than the 60-inch decks on NordicTrack and Sole, which matters for taller runners with a longer stride. The $2,695 machine price plus $49.99 per month for All-Access Membership adds up to $4,295 in the first year. Runners who use Peloton's classes daily will justify that cost. Runners who skip sessions will not.

highlights.title: Horizon 7.0 AT proves that $999 can buy a serious running machine
highlights.body: The Horizon 7.0 AT is the most compelling value in home treadmills because it refuses to compromise on the fundamentals at its price point. The 60-inch deck is full length, matching machines twice the price. The lifetime frame and motor warranty is the same promise Sole makes on the F80. QuickDial controls let you adjust speed and incline without looking away from your stride or fumbling with a touchscreen. The 3-Zone Variable Response Cushioning delivers different degrees of flex at the heel, midfoot, and toe strike, which is a mechanical cushioning engineering decision, not a cheap rubber mat. There is no built-in screen, no proprietary app, no subscription. For budget runners, walkers, and those building a home gym without the ongoing cost burden, this machine is the correct answer.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年家用跑步機市場的核心分野很清楚，一邊是 NordicTrack 和 Peloton 這種靠訂閱費建立生態的 AI 互動平台，另一邊是 Sole 和 Horizon 這種用硬體耐用度說話的免訂閱派。我把 NordicTrack Commercial 1750 排第一，因為 iFIT 的 SmartAdjust 技術在 2026 年真的跨過了一個門檻，AI 可以即時讀取你的心率，自動調整跑步機的速度和坡度，讓你維持在目標訓練區間，這不是噱頭，是真的有用的功能。

Sole F80 排第二，理由很單純，如果你不想每個月多付訂閱費，這台就是答案。3.5 CHP 馬力、22x60 吋跑道、CushionFlex 靜音減震、終身馬達保固，規格跟 NordicTrack 一樣紮實，價格少了七千多台幣，差別只在螢幕沒那麼大。

Bowflex Treadmill 22 的 -5% 到 20% 坡度範圍是這份名單裡最大的，業界一般上限是 12% 到 15%，Bowflex 直接拉到 20%，400 磅承重也是最高。針對要練坡度衝刺或越野馬拉松的跑者，這台的優勢很具體。

Horizon 7.0 AT 只要台幣三萬多，有終身保固、60 吋跑道、15% 坡度，完全不需要訂閱費，是預算有限但認真跑步的人的直接答案。

highlights.title: NordicTrack 1750 排第一：iFIT 的 AI 訓練在 2026 年進化到真正有用的程度
highlights.body: 2026 年 iFIT 推出的 SmartAdjust 功能，可以即時讀取你的心率，自動調整跑步機速度和坡度，讓訓練強度維持在你設定的目標區間。搭配「Realms You Can't Reach」系列的 AI 生成跑步環境，現在可以在家裡體驗攝影機拍不到的地形，這已經超過單純的影片課程庫。16 吋旋轉觸控螢幕、Netflix 和 Spotify 整合、終身馬達保固，$2,499 定價在這個功能水準算是合理。每月 $39 的 iFIT Pro 訂閱費是真實的成本，但認真用課程的跑者會感受到 AI 教練的價值。

highlights.title: Sole F80：不想付訂閱費又要嚴肅訓練，買這台就對了
highlights.body: 2026 年跑步機市場幾乎每個品牌都在推訂閱服務，Sole 用一台不需要任何月費的機器回應市場。3.5 CHP 馬力和 NordicTrack 1750 一樣，22x60 吋跑道尺寸完全相同，CushionFlex Whisper Deck 在長距離慢跑時的減震效果有工程師設計的紮實感，不是那種廉價橡皮墊的彈性感。10.1 吋 Android 觸控螢幕和無線充電板是實用的日常細節。終身框架和馬達保固代表 Sole 相信這台機器可以用得比對手更久，對每週跑量超過 50 英里的跑者來說，這個耐用性承諾就是最有說服力的理由。

highlights.title: Bowflex Treadmill 22：-5% 到 20% 坡度範圍，業界唯一
highlights.body: 市面上沒有第二台家用跑步機可以達到 20% 的最大坡度，業界一般上限是 12% 到 15%，NordicTrack 旗艦款也只到 15%。Bowflex Treadmill 22 拉到 20% 最大坡度再加上 -5% 的下坡模式，這個範圍才能真正模擬越野賽道和山路馬拉松的訓練需求。400 磅承重是這份名單裡最高的，22 吋螢幕可以直接串流 Netflix、Hulu 和 Amazon，JRNY 訂閱費每月只要 $20，比 iFIT 和 Peloton 便宜很多。如果你在訓練坡度為主的路跑或鐵人三項，這台在技術規格上是唯一的選擇。

highlights.title: Peloton Tread：社群動力最強，但每月 $49.99 會費要先算清楚
highlights.body: 如果你需要即時排行榜和社群壓力才能保持訓練一致性，Peloton Tread 是正確的選擇。Peloton IQ 即時跑姿回饋、Sonos 音響內建、直播課程的社群氛圍，這些功能其他平台目前都還沒到這個水準。要認真考慮的是費用結構，機器本身 $2,695，All-Access 會員每月 $49.99，第一年總花費超過 $4,200 美金。跑道尺寸 59x60 吋比 NordicTrack 和 Sole 的 60 吋稍短，高個子跑者要注意。每天都在用 Peloton 課程的人，這筆錢花得到，偶爾才跑的人要仔細想想。

highlights.title: Horizon 7.0 AT：三萬台幣有終身保固、60 吋跑道，預算跑者直接買
highlights.body: Horizon 7.0 AT 在千美金以下的級距裡沒有對手，因為它在基本規格上完全不妥協。60 吋跑道是完整尺寸，跟兩倍價格的機器一樣長。終身框架和馬達保固是 Sole 在 $1,799 才給的承諾，Horizon 在 $999 就給了。QuickDial 快速調速和坡度控制讓你不用把眼睛從跑道移開就能切換強度，3 Zone Variable Response Cushioning 在腳跟、中足、前掌三個接觸點提供不同硬度的減震，這是機械設計決策，不是隨便貼一塊橡皮。沒有螢幕、沒有訂閱費、不需要月費，對預算有限但認真訓練的跑者來說，這台是所有名單裡理性答案最清楚的選項。

references.title: Best Home Treadmills for 2026 (CPT-Tested & Reviewed)
The 11 Best Treadmills for Home Gyms of 2026
Best Treadmill for Home 2026

en.commentary:
Spring fitness season is in full effect, and the home treadmill market is seeing real sales momentum. The NordicTrack Commercial 1750 holds the top position today with the same conviction I've had since the start of 2026. There is no machine at the $2,499 price point that delivers the combination of hardware quality and connected training capability that iFIT and the 1750's 22x60-inch deck provide together. The AI-driven SmartAdjust coaching remains the most meaningful software advancement I've seen in this category, and the 3.5 CHP motor handles sustained high-paced running without thermal throttling.

The Sole F80 at second is the honest rebuttal to every connected treadmill's subscription model. Its 3.5 CHP motor matches the NordicTrack exactly, the CushionFlex Whisper Deck is the best shock absorption in the sub-$2,000 segment, and the lifetime motor warranty signals durability that the competition simply cannot guarantee. For runners who log 40 to 60 mile weeks at home and have no interest in paying monthly fees, this is the recommendation without hesitation.

The ProForm Carbon Pro 9000 is worth watching in 2026. At $1,399, it occupies a gap in the market that most brands leave underserved: a machine with genuine 3.5 CHP power, iFIT connectivity, and a 10-inch touch display that doesn't cost close to $2,500. Expert reviewers have consistently flagged it as an emerging value standout this spring, and I agree. It scores 8.5 on value for exactly that reason. For runners building their first serious home gym setup who want interactive training without committing to the NordicTrack price, the ProForm Carbon Pro 9000 now deserves serious consideration. The fundamentals are sound, and the iFIT platform access is identical to what the $2,499 machine provides.

highlights.title: NordicTrack 1750 Remains the Best All-Around Home Treadmill
highlights.body: The 22x60-inch deck, 3.5 CHP motor, 15% incline range, and 16-inch swiveling touchscreen are the hardware package. iFIT's SmartAdjust AI coaching, which reads real-time heart rate and adjusts speed and incline automatically to keep training zones accurate, is what separates this machine from competitors with similar specs. Spring 2026 reviews continue to confirm the 1750 as the category benchmark.

highlights.title: Sole F80 Is the Right Answer for Subscription-Free Serious Running
highlights.body: Expert reviews in April 2026 consistently note that the Sole F80 matches NordicTrack on deck size and motor power while costing $700 less and requiring zero monthly commitment. The CushionFlex Whisper Deck shock absorption is genuinely engineered, not simply padded. For marathon trainers and heavy weekly mileage runners, durability matters more than streaming classes, and Sole's lifetime warranty makes a concrete commitment to that premise.

highlights.title: ProForm Carbon Pro 9000 Emerges as the Spring Value Pick
highlights.body: At $1,399, the ProForm Carbon Pro 9000 offers 3.5 CHP motor performance, iFIT coaching access, and a 20% incline range at a price that undercuts the NordicTrack 1750 by over $1,000. Spring 2026 reviewers are calling it out as the best budget-to-mid-range treadmill for runners who want structured training without the premium price tag. If you can live without the large touchscreen, the training value per dollar is hard to beat.

highlights.title: 3.5 CHP Is the Motor Threshold That Matters for Serious Running
highlights.body: Expert consensus in 2026 has settled on 3.5 CHP continuous-duty motor rating as the minimum for runners who train at pace above 8 mph consistently. Below that threshold, motors exhibit thermal degradation over time and shorten machine lifespan. The NordicTrack 1750, Sole F80, and ProForm Carbon Pro 9000 all meet this threshold. The Echelon Stride 6 and Horizon 7.0 AT are below it, which is reflected directly in their lower motor power scores.

zh-tw.commentary:
春季健身旺季正式開跑，家用跑步機的銷量在四月明顯增溫。NordicTrack Commercial 1750 今天繼續排第一，理由沒變：$2,499 這個價位找不到第二台把硬體品質和 AI 訓練平台整合得這麼完整的機器。iFIT 的 SmartAdjust 即時心率讀取加自動坡速調整，是 2026 年這個類別裡我見過最有實際意義的軟體進步。3.5 CHP 馬力在長時間高速跑步下不會熱降頻，這很重要。

Sole F80 排第二，是每個訂閱制跑步機的最直接反駁。馬力跟 NordicTrack 一樣是 3.5 CHP，CushionFlex Whisper Deck 的減震是兩千元以下級距最好的，終身馬達保固是其他品牌做不出這個承諾的耐用性聲明。每週跑量超過 60 公里的跑者，這台比任何訂閱制機器都適合。

ProForm Carbon Pro 9000 在今年春天開始引起注意。$1,399 的定價填補了市場空缺，同樣 3.5 CHP 馬力、iFIT 訓練平台、20% 坡度範圍，價格比 NordicTrack 1750 便宜超過一萬台幣。我把它的性價比分數打 8.5，名符其實。想要互動訓練課程又不想付 NordicTrack 旗艦價的跑者，ProForm Carbon Pro 9000 現在是值得認真考慮的選項。

highlights.title: NordicTrack 1750 繼續是最均衡的家用跑步機
highlights.body: 22x60 吋跑道、3.5 CHP 馬力、15% 最大坡度、16 吋旋轉觸控螢幕，這是硬體基礎。iFIT SmartAdjust 即時讀取心率、自動調整速度和坡度讓你維持在目標訓練區間，這是把競爭對手拉開距離的關鍵。春季 2026 的專家評測繼續確認 1750 是這個類別的基準。

highlights.title: Sole F80 是不付訂閱費的認真跑者唯一正確答案
highlights.body: 四月的專家評測一致指出，Sole F80 跟 NordicTrack 的跑道尺寸和馬力完全一樣，售價卻便宜很多，而且不需要任何月費。CushionFlex Whisper Deck 的減震是真正工程設計的結果，終身保固是具體的耐用性承諾。對高週跑量或馬拉松訓練者，這台的性價比勝過任何訂閱制機器。

highlights.title: ProForm Carbon Pro 9000 是今年春天最值得注意的預算選擇
highlights.body: $1,399 的售價配上 3.5 CHP 馬力、iFIT 訓練平台存取、20% 坡度範圍，比 NordicTrack 1750 便宜超過一萬台幣。春季評測者把它列為預算到中階價位最佳選擇，我認同這個判斷。如果你可以接受較小的觸控螢幕，這台的訓練價值每塊錢算起來是市場裡最划算的之一。

references.title: Best treadmills 2026: top home and commercial picks tested

en.commentary: Treadmill rankings hold steady this week. The NordicTrack Commercial 1750 holds #1 on the combination of tech features, deck size, and motor power. The 14-inch HD interactive touchscreen, iFIT integration with on-demand and live classes, and 22x60-inch deck create the most complete home treadmill package. The Sole F80 at #2 leads on build quality at 9.5 and has the same large deck dimension without the subscription requirement — iFIT is optional on NordicTrack but actively promoted. For buyers who want a quality treadmill without committing to a fitness content subscription, the F80 is the stronger practical choice. Peloton Tread at #4 has the best tech feature score at 9.5 when you're subscribed, but the value at 6.0 reflects that its pricing requires ongoing Peloton membership to justify the purchase.

highlights.title: NordicTrack Commercial 1750 leads on tech and deck size together
highlights.body: 22x60-inch running surface is one of the largest in this ranking, accommodating taller runners with longer strides. The 14-inch iFIT touchscreen with 12% incline and -3% decline creates a simulation range that covers most training scenarios. Tech feature score of 9.5 reflects how comprehensive the iFIT ecosystem is when actively used.

highlights.title: Sole F80 at #2 is the best choice for buyers who don't want a subscription
highlights.body: Build quality at 9.5 reflects commercial-grade components in a home-priced treadmill. The Cushion Flex Whisper Deck reduces impact without feeling mushy. The F80 comes with Bluetooth audio, chest strap compatibility, and a basic display that doesn't require app connectivity. No ongoing subscription needed.

highlights.title: Life Fitness T3 at #7 is the commercial-quality durability pick
highlights.body: Cushioning score of 9.5 and build quality at 9.5 are the highest in this ranking. Life Fitness builds for commercial gym environments, and the T3 brings that construction to the home market. The lower tech features score reflects the intentional simplicity — no touchscreen, just a straightforward console. For long-term durability, nothing else in this ranking competes.

zh-tw.commentary: 跑步機市場這週沒有新動作，排名穩定。NordicTrack Commercial 1750 以科技功能、跑台尺寸和馬達動力的三重優勢守住第 1，22x60 吋跑台是這個排名最大的，14 吋 HD 觸控螢幕搭 iFIT 訓練課程讓它成為功能最完整的家用跑步機組合。Sole F80 第 2 名建造品質分數 9.5 是整個排名最高，同樣的大跑台不需要訂閱 iFIT，對不想綁定健身內容訂閱的買家是更實際的選擇。Peloton Tread 第 4 名在訂閱狀態下的科技功能分數 9.5 最高，但整體售價需要持續付費 Peloton 會員才合算，反映在 6.0 的性價比分數上。

highlights.title: NordicTrack Commercial 1750 以最大跑台和最完整科技功能守住第 1
highlights.body: 22x60 吋跑台面積是這個排名最大的，配合 14 吋 iFIT 觸控螢幕、12% 坡度和 -3% 下坡，涵蓋幾乎所有訓練場景。科技功能分數 9.5 反映 iFIT 生態系在積極使用時的全面性。

highlights.title: Sole F80 第 2 名是不想綁訂閱的買家最佳選擇
highlights.body: 建造品質分數 9.5 反映商用等級零件在家用售價的實現，Cushion Flex Whisper Deck 緩震設計減少衝擊又不會感覺太軟。藍牙音訊和胸帶連接不需要 App，完整功能不需要訂閱，是純粹跑步訓練最實際的選擇。

highlights.title: Life Fitness T3 第 7 名以商用等級耐用性勝出
highlights.body: 緩震和建造品質分數都是 9.5，是整個排名最高。Life Fitness 為商業健身房設計，T3 把那個建造標準帶進家用市場。科技功能分數低反映它刻意的簡單設計，沒有觸控螢幕，只有基本控制台。長期耐用性方面這個排名沒有其他選擇能比。

references.title: The Best Treadmills of 2026 | Lab Tested & Ranked
Best Treadmills 2026: We Tested 15+ Treadmills

en.commentary: NordicTrack Commercial 1750 holds #1 for runners who want the full connected fitness experience. The 3.6 CHP motor, 22x60-inch deck, and iFIT integration with a 22-inch HD touchscreen put it at the top of the testing results across multiple review sources. The 14-second incline-to-decline transition time is the fastest in the category. Sole F80 at #2 is the recommendation I make to buyers who are skeptical of subscription requirements. Sole+ training platform is included with purchase — no ongoing cost. Commercial-grade durability in a home-use package at $1,799 is genuinely strong value. The Bowflex Treadmill 22 at #3 takes a different approach with a 22-inch incline range that includes -3% to 20% — useful for interval training protocols. Peloton Tread at #4 is the best class-based experience in the category. Peloton's instructor quality and class variety remain unmatched. The question is whether the subscription cost is worth it over a 3-5 year ownership period — for heavy users, the math works. For occasional users, it does not.

highlights.title: NordicTrack Commercial 1750's 14-second incline transition is the fastest in its class
highlights.body: 0 to 12% incline in 14 seconds, 1 to 14 MPH speed range. These transition speeds matter for HIIT interval training where the value is in rapid transitions between intensities. Combined with iFIT's library of trainer-led sessions, this is the most complete training platform in the category.

highlights.title: Sole F80 at $1,799 is commercial-grade durability without the subscription requirement
highlights.body: Sole+ training platform is included at purchase with no ongoing subscription. 3.5 CHP motor, 22x60-inch deck, and independent lab ratings confirm commercial-grade build quality. For buyers who want a treadmill that will last a decade without a monthly payment attached, the F80 is the correct answer.

highlights.title: Peloton Tread's class ecosystem justifies the subscription for heavy users
highlights.body: Instructor quality and class variety in Peloton's library are still unmatched in the treadmill category. For users who work out 5+ days per week and use the platform consistently, the subscription ROI is positive. For 2-3 day per week users, the same money buys a Sole F80 with more hardware for less total cost.

zh-tw.commentary: NordicTrack Commercial 1750 守住第一，適合想要完整連網健身體驗的跑者。3.6 馬力馬達、22x60 吋跑道面、iFIT 整合搭配 22 吋高清觸控螢幕，在多個評測來源的測試結果裡都排在前面。14 秒的坡度切換時間是這個類別裡最快的。Sole F80 排第二，是我推薦給對訂閱費抱持疑慮的買家的選擇，Sole+ 訓練平台在購買時就包含在內，沒有持續費用，NT$57,000 左右提供商業等級耐用性的家用產品確實是很強的性價比。Bowflex Treadmill 22 排第三，-3% 到 20% 的坡度範圍對間歇訓練計劃很有用。Peloton Tread 排第四，是這個類別裡課程體驗最好的選擇，Peloton 的教練品質和課程多樣性仍然無人能及，問題是在三到五年的擁有期內訂閱費是否划算，重度使用者算得過來，偶爾使用者算不過來。

highlights.title: NordicTrack Commercial 1750 的 14 秒坡度切換是同類別最快的
highlights.body: 從零到 12% 坡度只要 14 秒，時速 1.6 到 22.5 公里的速度範圍，這些切換速度對 HIIT 間歇訓練很重要，因為快速在不同強度之間切換才是這種訓練的核心價值，搭配 iFIT 豐富的教練帶課資源，這是這個類別最完整的訓練平台。

highlights.title: Sole F80 提供商業等級耐用性而且不需要訂閱
highlights.body: Sole+ 訓練平台購買時就包含在內沒有持續訂閱，3.5 馬力馬達、22x60 吋跑道、獨立實驗室評分確認商業等級的建造品質，對想要一台能用十年而且不帶月費的跑步機，F80 是最正確的答案。

highlights.title: Peloton Tread 的課程生態系統對重度使用者來說值得訂閱費
highlights.body: Peloton 的教練品質和課程多樣性在跑步機類別裡仍然無人能及，對每週跑五天以上並且持續使用平台的人，訂閱的投資報酬率是正的，對每週兩三天的用戶，同樣的錢買 Sole F80 硬體更好而且總費用更低。

references.title: Our 8 Best Treadmills for 2026
NordicTrack X24 Treadmill Review (2026): The King of the Hill
Best Treadmills 2026: We Tested 15+ Treadmills to Find the Best

en.commentary:
NordicTrack Commercial 1750 holds rank 1 in April 2026 as the best treadmill for most home buyers. The 1750 is NordicTrack's sweet-spot configuration: the same powerful motor and 22" × 60" running deck as the 2450, with a 14" touchscreen instead of 22", at a significantly lower price point. For buyers who want iFIT-integrated connected training without the premium 2450 price, the 1750 delivers everything that matters.

NordicTrack launched its 2026 lineup this spring, replacing the X22i and X32i with the new X16 and X24 incline trainers. The X24 at $3,999 introduces a 24" pivoting flatscreen with built-in Netflix and a 40% incline — the highest in the market. This positions the X24 as an aspirational upgrade for serious runners who want extreme incline training, though it did not displace the 1750 from rank 1 due to the significant price premium.

Sole F80 holds rank 2 as the best treadmill for build quality and cushioning. The 9.5 build quality and 9.0 cushioning scores reflect a frame that outlasts most competitors under heavy daily use, and the Cushion Flex Whisper Deck technology reduces joint impact in a way that matters for injury-prone or older runners.

Bowflex Treadmill 22 holds rank 3 for its 9.0 tech features score, which includes a 22" HD touchscreen and JRNY subscription-based workout content library.

highlights.title: NordicTrack 1750 Is the Right Value Point in NordicTrack's 2026 Lineup
highlights.body: The 2026 NordicTrack lineup includes the new X16 and X24 incline trainers at premium prices, plus the 2450 upgrade over the 1750. The 1750 sits at the sweet spot: nearly identical performance to the 2450 with a smaller touchscreen at a meaningfully lower price. For most home runners, the larger screen on the 2450 does not justify the cost difference.

highlights.title: Sole F80's Build Quality Outlasts the Competition Under Heavy Daily Use
highlights.body: A 9.5 build quality score reflects a frame and belt system engineered for commercial-grade durability in a home price bracket. Runners who exercise daily or who plan to keep a treadmill for 10+ years will find the Sole F80's structural integrity holds up where consumer-grade NordicTrack and Bowflex frames can show wear.

highlights.title: NordicTrack's New X24 at $3,999 Introduces 40% Incline — the Highest Available
highlights.body: The replacement for the X32i offers 40% maximum incline and -6% decline training, a 24" pivoting flatscreen with built-in Netflix, and the same 22" × 60" running deck as the 1750. For serious incline trainers who treat the treadmill as an elevation simulator, the X24's incline range is in a category of its own.

zh-tw.commentary:
NordicTrack Commercial 1750 在 2026 年四月繼續是跑步機第一名，是大多數家庭買家的最佳選擇。1750 是 NordicTrack 陣容裡最划算的配置：和 2450 同樣強力的馬達和 22" × 60" 跑道，只換了更小的 14" 觸控螢幕，但價格明顯更低。想要 iFIT 連線訓練但不想花 2450 溢價的買家，1750 提供了所有重要的東西。

NordicTrack 今年春季推出了 2026 年新品陣容，用新的 X16 和 X24 坡度訓練機取代 X22i 和 X32i。X24 定價 3,999 美元，配備 24" 可旋轉平板螢幕含內建 Netflix 和 40% 的最大坡度，是市場上最高的。但因為和 1750 的巨大價差，X24 沒有取代 1750 的第一名位置。

Sole F80 第二名，建造品質和緩震最好的跑步機。9.5 的建造品質和 9.0 的緩震分數反映了一個在高強度日常使用下比大多數競品更耐久的機架，Cushion Flex Whisper Deck 技術減少的關節衝擊對容易受傷或年長的跑者是真實重要的。

Bowflex Treadmill 22 第三名靠的是 9.0 的科技功能分數，22" HD 觸控螢幕和 JRNY 訂閱制訓練內容庫。

highlights.title: NordicTrack 1750 是 2026 年陣容裡的最佳性價比點
highlights.body: 2026 年 NordicTrack 新品陣容包含高價的 X16 和 X24 坡度訓練機，以及比 1750 升級的 2450。1750 是甜蜜點：和 2450 幾乎相同的效能但更小的螢幕，價格明顯更低。對大多數家用跑者，2450 更大的螢幕不值得那個溢價。

highlights.title: Sole F80 的建造品質在高強度日常使用下優於競品
highlights.body: 9.5 的建造品質分數反映了以家庭價格達到商業耐久度的機架和跑帶系統。每天運動或計畫使用十年以上的跑者，Sole F80 的結構完整性在 NordicTrack 和 Bowflex 的消費級機架開始顯示磨損的地方仍然撐得住。

highlights.title: NordicTrack 新款 X24 的 40% 最大坡度是目前市場最高
highlights.body: X32i 的後繼機型提供 40% 最大坡度和 -6% 下坡訓練、24" 可旋轉內建 Netflix 觸控螢幕，以及和 1750 相同的 22" × 60" 跑道。對把跑步機當爬坡訓練模擬器的認真跑者，X24 的坡度範圍在這個類別裡是獨一無二的。

references.title: Best Treadmills 2026: Expert Tested and Ranked
NordicTrack Commercial 1750 vs Sole F80 2026 Comparison
Best Treadmills of 2026 for Home Use

en.commentary: NordicTrack Commercial 1750 holds the top position in April 2026 with the combination of a 3.75 CHP motor, 10-inch HD touchscreen with iFIT integration, and a 0-15% incline range that makes it the most feature-complete treadmill at its price point. The iFIT library of on-demand and live instructor-led workouts is the largest in the category and adds genuine value beyond the hardware. Sole F80 earns second for buyers who want commercial-grade build quality without the subscription ecosystem — the motor reliability and frame durability on the F80 consistently test above its price point, and it runs silently enough for apartment use. Bowflex Treadmill 22 at third provides the widest incline range in the group at -5% to +20%, which is the feature that matters for serious hill training.

highlights.title: NordicTrack 1750's iFIT Library Is the Best In-Workout Content Platform
highlights.body: Thousands of on-demand runs across real-world locations, automatic incline control that follows the trainer's terrain, and live classes make iFIT the most compelling fitness content platform in the treadmill category. The hardware is excellent; the software ecosystem extends the value considerably.

highlights.title: Sole F80 Motor Reliability Tests Above Its Price Class
highlights.body: Third-party longevity testing on the Sole F80's Mitsuba motor consistently shows it performing at commercial-grade durability standards. For buyers who want a treadmill that survives heavy daily use for a decade without motor issues, the F80's reliability record is compelling.

highlights.title: Bowflex Treadmill 22's -5% to +20% Incline Range Is Unmatched for Hill Training
highlights.body: Decline capability at -5% combined with 20% incline creates the full range of terrain simulation that no other treadmill in this price tier matches. For runners training for trail races or incline-focused programs, the Bowflex 22's incline range is a genuine equipment advantage.

zh-tw.commentary: NordicTrack Commercial 1750 在 2026 年 4 月排第一，3.75 CHP 馬力、10 吋 HD 觸控螢幕加 iFIT 整合、0 到 15% 坡度範圍，這個組合在這個價位的功能完整度找不到對手。iFIT 的隨選和直播教練課程庫是這個分類最大的，加上硬體本身的品質，整體價值很高。Sole F80 以商業等級的構建品質拿第二，馬達可靠性和機架耐用性的測試成績比這個價位應有的更好，安靜程度也夠在公寓使用。Bowflex Treadmill 22 提供這組裡最寬的坡度範圍 -5% 到 +20%，對認真做坡度訓練的跑者來說這個功能很有意義。

highlights.title: NordicTrack 1750 的 iFIT 內容平台是最好的跑步內容庫
highlights.body: 數千個全球各地的實景跑步課程、自動跟隨教練地形的坡度控制、加上直播課程，iFIT 是跑步機分類裡最有吸引力的健身內容平台，硬體很好，軟體生態系統讓整體價值更高。

highlights.title: Sole F80 馬達可靠性超越這個價位的預期
highlights.body: 第三方長期測試顯示 Sole F80 的馬達達到商業等級的耐用性標準。想要一台能撐十年每天重度使用的跑步機，F80 的可靠性記錄很有說服力。

highlights.title: Bowflex Treadmill 22 的 -5% 到 +20% 坡度範圍是爬坡訓練首選
highlights.body: -5% 下坡加上 20% 上坡，這個範圍的地形模擬在這個價位是唯一的。越野跑者或以坡度為核心的訓練計畫，Bowflex 22 的坡度範圍是真正的設備優勢。

references.title: Best treadmills 2026: tested for home and gym use

en.commentary: NordicTrack Commercial 1750 holds the top position this week. The 9.5 scores on both deck size and tech features reflect what this treadmill actually delivers: a 22x60-inch running surface that accommodates any stride length, and an iFit interactive training platform with a 14-inch adjustable touchscreen that makes structured workouts genuinely engaging. The -3% decline capability adds a workout dimension that most treadmills lack entirely. Sole F80 at #2 earns the build quality and cushioning leadership — 9.5 on both metrics reflects a commercial-grade frame and the Sole Cushion Flex Whisper Deck that I'd put against any treadmill at twice the price for long-run comfort. For runners who train seriously and care about joint impact over years of use, the F80's construction quality is the argument. Bowflex Treadmill 22 at #3 has the second-best tech feature set at 9.0 — similar JRNY platform experience to NordicTrack but with 20-degree incline as a differentiator. Aviron Victory Treadmill at #6 earns a special mention for gaming integration — its resistance-based game content makes indoor running genuinely addictive for users who struggle with treadmill motivation.

highlights.title: NordicTrack 1750's -3% decline is the training dimension most treadmills don't offer
highlights.body: Running on a decline activates different muscle groups — particularly the quadriceps and hip flexors — that flat or incline running doesn't target as intensely. The 1750's -3% to +15% range covers both downhill and uphill training in a single machine. For runners training for trail races or trying to reduce hamstring dominance in their stride, the decline capability is not a gimmick.

highlights.title: Sole F80 commercial-grade frame is built for decades of use
highlights.body: The F80's steel frame is rated for 375 lbs and designed to the same specifications as commercial gym treadmills. The Cushion Flex Whisper Deck reduces joint impact by 40% compared to running on pavement in independent testing. For users who run 30-plus miles per week on a treadmill, the long-term structural integrity of the Sole F80 is the reason to spend more than on a consumer-grade machine.

highlights.title: Aviron Victory gaming integration solves treadmill motivation for most people
highlights.body: Aviron's game library turns running speed and incline into game controls — you row harder or run faster to perform better in the game. For users who consistently find excuses to skip treadmill sessions, this engagement model converts a chore into play. The 9.5 tech features score reflects this engagement capability, though the 5.5 value score reflects premium pricing.

zh-tw.commentary: NordicTrack Commercial 1750 繼續排第一，甲板尺寸和科技功能兩項都是 9.5，反映這台跑步機的實際交付：22x60 吋的跑步面積可以容納任何步幅，加上 14 吋可調觸控螢幕的 iFit 互動訓練平台讓結構化訓練真正吸引人。-3% 下坡功能是大多數跑步機根本沒有的訓練維度。Sole F80 排第二靠做工和緩衝，兩項都是 9.5，商業級機架加上 Sole Cushion Flex Whisper Deck，在長時間跑步的關節衝擊保護上，我願意把它和兩倍價格的競品比。對認真訓練且關心多年使用下關節影響的跑者，F80 的製造品質是它的論點。Bowflex Treadmill 22 排第三科技功能評分 9.0，20 度坡度是它的差異化功能。Aviron Victory 的遊戲整合值得特別提及，它把室內跑步變成真正讓人上癮的體驗，對常常找藉口跳過跑步機訓練的人特別有效。

highlights.title: NordicTrack 1750 的 -3% 下坡是大多數跑步機都沒有的訓練維度
highlights.body: 下坡跑步激活的肌肉群，特別是股四頭肌和髂腰肌，是平路或上坡跑步訓練強度不夠的部位。1750 的 -3% 到 +15% 範圍在一台機器上覆蓋了下坡和上坡訓練。對準備越野賽或想要減少步態中後腿主導模式的跑者，下坡功能是真實的訓練工具，不是噱頭。

highlights.title: Sole F80 的商業級機架是為幾十年使用而建造的
highlights.body: F80 的鋼製機架額定承重 170 公斤，設計規格與商業健身房跑步機相同。Cushion Flex Whisper Deck 在獨立測試中比在路面跑步減少 40% 的關節衝擊。對每週在跑步機上跑超過 50 公里的使用者，Sole F80 的長期結構完整性是比消費級機器多花錢的理由。

highlights.title: Aviron Victory 的遊戲整合解決了大多數人對跑步機的動力問題
highlights.body: Aviron 的遊戲庫把跑步速度和坡度轉化為遊戲控制，跑得更快或爬坡就能在遊戲裡表現更好。對常常找藉口跳過跑步機訓練的人，這種參與模式把義務變成樂趣。9.5 的科技功能評分反映這個參與能力，但 5.5 的性價比評分反映了溢價定價。
